commands.narrative:
**Roster:** No changes since yesterday — 65 strategies, 62 enabled, 3 disabled. Roster diff is clean.

**Two new promotion-bar crossings overnight.** The 385 trades executed on 05-19 pushed v10-best-double to exactly n=100 and kept v25-bot-excl-climbing building — both now clear all four SOL-bar gates. No new trades today (graduation_rate_drop anomaly: 0 projected vs 7-day median 205), so scores are unchanged from those overnight settlements. Today is the third consecutive near-zero-trading-day; diagnose remains HEALTHY at Levels 1–4, but pipeline_health shows "NO_GRADS" at the upper-layer check (848s without a graduation).

**v25-bot-excl-climbing hits score 100 (up +15 from yesterday's 55).** n=164, total=+1.963 SOL, drop3=+0.257 SOL, monthly=+10.04 SOL/mo — all four gates clear. Panel 11 proxy ("vel 20-50 + dd>-10%") shows wr_std=5.7 (STABLE). Important caveat: drop3 has been oscillating — it was +0.257 today, was -0.187 yesterday (both with no new trades), meaning the margin is thin. Recommend verifying drop3 stays positive after the next full trading day before pulling the live trigger.

**v10-best-double now at n=100, score=85, all four gates clear.** total=+3.533 SOL, drop3=+1.208 SOL, monthly=+5.87 SOL/mo. Drop3 margin is wider and more stable than v25-bot-excl-climbing. Panel 11 same proxy (wr_std=5.7 STABLE). Caveat: carries a DECAYING edge flag (recent-30 median -28.92% vs all-time median -14.49%). Edge is real by SOL-bar standards but the last 30 trades have been weaker — confirm the flag clears or at minimum that drop3 stays positive after next batch.

**v25-bot-excl-tp150 still running despite HIT-KILL status — 5th escalation.** n=264, total=-4.292 SOL, drop3=-6.937 SOL. Was marked EXECUTED in yesterday's action items but the strategy is still enabled in strategies.json today. This is a data-hygiene discrepancy: the action item was pre-resolved before the kill command was confirmed. Re-proposing with high priority. Three new INVALID strategies also emerged overnight as v27-bot-excl-tp75 variants all crossed n=100 with negative P&L: v27-tp75 (n=101, drop3=-2.488, HIT-KILL), v27-tp75-ttp (n=101, drop3=-3.679, HIT-KILL), v27-tp75-sl20 (n=103, drop3=-1.621). All three should be killed together. v21-bottom-excluded also remains INVALID at n=393 with drop3=-0.505.

**v9 shadow trio continues to watch-list hold.** v9shadow-vel20-top5 (score=92.4, n=62, drop3=+0.657) and v9shadow-velmono-dev (score=87.6, n=38, drop3=+2.422 — highest drop3 in the roster) are both pacing toward the bar. velmono-dev's drop3 of +2.422 is the strongest outlier-robustness signal in the entire roster — if that holds to n=100, it will be a strong promote candidate. Three edge_decay flags (velmid-liq-mono, v20-vel2050-dd-base, v10-best-double) are noted but do not override the SOL-bar evaluation.

**Operator priority:** (1) Execute kills for v25-bot-excl-tp150 + v27-bot-excl-tp75 trio + v21-bottom-excluded. (2) Validate v25-bot-excl-climbing and v10-best-double after the next active trading day, then promote whichever sustains drop3>0. (3) Deploy v28-vel50200-recovery as a shadow strategy (journal proposal from 05-19 still has NO-DATA status — no strategy command was pushed yet).
